description: Agentic Workflow Plan: Case Creation Pipeline

userStories.title: Initialize Casework
userStories.description: Verifies case is eligible for processing, and setup the necessary casework directories
acceptanceCriteria: Verify the case exists in ngm database
Required folders are there and are empty
progress.log has marked the workflow is eligible for running

userStories.title: Fetch Judicial Data
userStories.description: Pull the crucial sources and factual data to start the case work.
acceptanceCriteria: sources/case_<case_number>_<date-time>.md file exists, and includes the case infomration, plaintiff/defendants, and hearings.
CIAA Press release raw file (PDF or DOC or equivalent) is downloaded.
CIAA Press release is converted to markdown in sources/markdown/ using convert_to_markdown tool.
Attorney General's Office charge sheet raw file (PDF or DOC or equivalent) is downloaded.
Attorney General's Office charge sheet is converted to markdown in sources/markdown/ using convert_to_markdown tool.
Bolpatra (procurement documents) are downloaded if IFB/RFP/EOI/PQ numbers are found in press release or charge sheet.

userStories.title: Fetch News Articles
userStories.description: Fetch news items from Web search regarding the case.
acceptanceCriteria: Relevant news items regarding the case are fetched
News articles are saved as markdown in sources/markdown/

userStories.title: Convert Remaining Documents to Markdown
userStories.description: Convert any remaining raw files (like bolpatra PDFs) to markdown using the convert_to_markdown tool.
acceptanceCriteria: All remaining raw files (bolpatra documents, etc.) have been converted to markdown.

userStories.title: Draft a Case Locally
userStories.description: We prepare the information necessary to file a Jawafdehi case. The actual Jawafdehi case is created on the next user story.
acceptanceCriteria: A local case draft file exists.
The case draft has all the information necessary to submit to the Jawafdehi website.
The case draft has gone through an AI review to ensure that it meets the content requirements.

userStories.title: Submit the case to Jawafdehi
userStories.description: We prepare a Jawafdehi case to be submitted to the Jawafdehi website.
acceptanceCriteria: All entities, timeline, key allegations, description, tags, and other fields have been populated.
